title: Scientists Are Making Alien Ice
description:
The ice on Neptune is hot, black, and may cause the planet to rain diamonds. 

If you had to describe ice how would you do it? You’d probably say hard, white or clear but most importantly COLD. The ice on Earth is so familiar to us that it’s hard to imagine it any other way, but the truth is “ice” isn’t a temperature at all, it’s a structure. Ice on alien worlds comes in all different forms – it can even be hot! Over the past 100 years, scientists have been working on ways to create new forms of alien ice and they just made another one…

#Ice #Science #shorts
